response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, seasoned generalist with 25+ years across web, mobile, and embedded work, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments and a thesis project, far short of the required 8 years, and his large-scale infrastructure experience (low-latency DLang services at Sociomantic) is roughly 2 years against the required 5. His strengths lie in TypeScript/Node full-stack product work and testing culture rather than cloud compute platform architecture or formal technical leadership of infrastructure teams.
strengths: Deep testing and software-craftsmanship expertise (TDD, CI/CD, test frameworks, workshops)
Real low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Sociomantic (millions of requests/sec)
Long, broad engineering career with mentoring, teaching, and open-source leadership
concerns: C++ experience is under 1 year professionally versus the 8-year minimum requirement
Limited large-scale infrastructure/distributed-systems depth; most recent decade is full-stack product work
No formal technical-leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or owning platform strategy
